title: Baby Foil Cake Topper | Gold | 1 Pc.
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 gold foil cake topper.
EYE-CATCHING DESIGN: This cake topper features a "Baby" headline in gold color.
PERFECT CAKE DECORATION: This cake topper can match different cake styles and make it more attractive.
FOOD SAFE MATERIALS: This cake topper is made of eco-friendly materials and harmless for your health.
WARM NOTE: This cake topper is not edible and for decoration only, please do not use it in the oven or microwave.
description: Product Description Celebrate any new mum and her bundle of joy with this delightful Gold Script "Baby" Baby Shower Cake Topper. Featuring elegant foil script, this cake decoration is ideal to welcome the arrival of a new infant at a baby shower or gender reveal party. Simply insert the decoration into to the top of a celebration cake to give it an easy, yet professional finish. Box Contains 1 x Pack of 5 Pearlised Latex Number 6 Birthday Balloons
